name: Do Not Disturb
description: Turn macOS Do Not Disturb on, off, or toggle it from Coco AI. Ported from the Raycast Do Not Disturb extension by yakitrak (MIT). Requires a one-time install of the bundled `DND Raycast.shortcut` (see README).

commands.name: Turn On Do Not Disturb
commands.description: Enable Do Not Disturb mode by running the bundled "DND Raycast" macOS Shortcut.

commands.name: Turn Off Do Not Disturb
commands.description: Disable Do Not Disturb mode by running the bundled "DND Raycast" macOS Shortcut.

commands.name: Toggle Do Not Disturb
commands.description: Toggle Do Not Disturb mode by inspecting the current state and flipping it via the bundled "DND Raycast" macOS Shortcut.

args: if [ -n "$(echo status | shortcuts run 'DND Raycast' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo off | shortcuts run 'DND Raycast' >/dev/null 2>&1; else echo on | shortcuts run 'DND Raycast' >/dev/null 2>&1; fi
